case_title: ANTOINE CASEY HOSKINS-MCQUEEN VS. LIONEL LYEN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HOSKINS-MCQUEEN, ANTOINE CASEY AS TO DEFENDANT LYEN, LIONEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY HOSKINS-MCQUEEN, ANTOINE CASEY LYEN, LIONEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2011 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOSKINS-MCQUEEN, ANTOINE CASEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYEN, LIONEL $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $575.00, THE COURT ACCEPTS PLAINTIFF'S VERSIOM OF THE ACCIDENT, BUT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED MONETERY, OUT OF POCKET DAMAGES BEYOND $500.00 PAID TOWARD THE REPLACEMENT CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
